no_anomaly_coverage.searched_population: Records R900008 and R900009 retrieved via get_expense_detail; both invoices checked via find_invoice_usage

checked_rules: 第十条: 同一发票最多报销1次
no_anomaly_coverage.conclusion: FPDEV900008 used 1 time (R900008 only); FPDEV900009 used 1 time (R900009 only); invoices are different (FPDEV900008 ≠ FPDEV900009), employees are different (E9001 ≠ E9002), vendors are different (开发供应商08 ≠ 开发供应商09). No same-invoice duplicate found. 无异常.
